description_long: This is a two-story residential cabin with a gable roof covered in gray shingles and white-painted wooden siding. The front facade features a covered porch with a wooden railing and steps, decorated with a string of colorful flags. There are several windows of varying sizes, including a shuttered window on the side and a prominent window above the porch. A chimney is visible on one side, suggesting a fireplace inside. The structure appears to be primarily constructed of wood, with some metal and glass elements for fixtures and windows. The overall design is reminiscent of a traditional American craftsman or farmhouse style, suitable for suburban or urban neighborhoods.
description: A white-painted, two-story wooden cabin with a gable roof, covered porch, and multiple windows, featuring a chimney and decorative elements.
description_view_0: Side view showing a single shuttered window, a satellite dish, and part of the porch and balcony.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the covered porch with railing, steps, and colorful flags, as well as the main entrance and upper balcony.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the chimney, a long blank wall, and partial views of the porch and balcony.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the plain back wall and the gable roof, with no visible windows or doors.
attribute_roof_type: gable roof with moderate pitch, covered in gray asphalt shingles, featuring a small overhang and a chimney on one side
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical arrangement with a mix of single and paired rectangular windows, including a shuttered window on one side, a large window above the porch, and additional windows on the front and side facades
attribute_door_placement: single main door centered on the front facade, accessed via the covered porch and steps
